title: Records Relating to the Investigation into Online Radicalization in the 2022 Buffalo Shooting

communications.subject: New York Freedom of Information Law Request: Records Relating to the Investigation into Online Radicalization in the 2022 Buffalo Shooting
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the New York Freedom of Information Law, I hereby request the following records:

I am requesting records related to the New York Attorney General's investigation into how Payton Gendron used online platforms to plan and publicize the May 14, 2022, mass shooting at Tops Friendly Markets in Buffalo, New York. This includes but is not limited to:

- The full investigative report or any summary reports produced by the AG's office reviewing Gendron's online activity and radicalization
- Any communications between the AG's office and social media platforms (including but not limited to Twitch, Discord, and Reddit) in connection with this investigation
- Any recommendations made by the AG's office to social media platforms or state legislators arising from this investigation

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jackie Khones

title: Records Relating to Payton Gendron Prior to May 14, 2022

communications.subject: New York Freedom of Information Law Request: Records Relating to Payton Gendron Prior to May 14, 2022
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the New York Freedom of Information Law, I hereby request the following records:

I am requesting all records held by the New York State Police relating to Payton Gendron (DOB: June 20, 2003) prior to the mass shooting on May 14, 2022, at Tops Friendly Markets in Buffalo, New York. This includes but is not limited to:

- Any Extreme Risk Protection Order (red flag law) assessments, filings, or evaluations involving Payton Gendron
- Records of any prior contact, investigations, or threat assessments involving Payton Gendron
- Any inter-agency communications regarding Payton Gendron prior to May 14, 2022
- Records relating to the November 2021 school threat incident in which Gendron was referred for a mental health evaluation

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jackie Khones

title: Records Relating to the May 14, 2022 Tops Friendly Markets Shooting

communications.subject: New York Freedom of Information Law Request: Records Relating to the May 14, 2022 Tops Friendly Markets Shooting
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the New York Freedom of Information Law, I hereby request the following records:

I am requesting all records related to the police response to the mass shooting that occurred on May 14, 2022, at Tops Friendly Markets, 1275 Jefferson Avenue, Buffalo, New York. This includes but is not limited to:

- Initial incident and arrest reports filed in connection with the event
- Body camera footage from all officers who responded to the scene
- Police dispatch logs and internal communications from May 14, 2022, pertaining to this incident
- A chronological timeline or after-action report of the police response, if one was produced
- Any records of prior contact between the Buffalo Police Department and Payton Gendron before May 14, 2022

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jackie Khones
